title: Enderite Gear & Tools
description: A mod that adds the long wanted enderite to minecraft
body:
This mod adds the long wanted enderite.

We all want a end update and with getting netherite in the nether update i think enderite to will be an exelent edition.

#You can find the "end_smithing_template"/enderite in the end and with the end smithing template, diamond gear/Tools and enderite ingot you smith them together like for netherite.  



So just enjoy this mod, altho its not a big mod i hope it can be a fun eddition
- new bugfix update comming soon :)


Hope u enjoy Lehraan
